summary: Iter43 frontend-only validation of VELA homepage rewrite + Nav simplification + Reports page + Invest/Operate microcopy. All 11 review-request features verified end-to-end on the live preview URL. 62 distinct testid/copy/navigation assertions executed; 62 effective pass after correcting test-script case-sensitivity vs CSS text-transform:uppercase. Mobile (390px) confirmed no horizontal overflow. CTA navigation and Demo-button routing both working.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile Nav panel still has button labelled 'Enter VELA' (Nav.jsx line ~220, data-testid='mobile-nav-enter-vela') while the desktop Demo button was renamed to 'Demo'. For brand/copy consistency consider renaming the mobile equivalent to 'Demo' with data-testid='mobile-nav-demo-btn' as well. Non-blocking, but inconsistent with the new naming.

Reports cards 'Open' button triggers window.print() of the entire current /reports page (i.e. the list itself), not a per-report PDF/preview. Acceptable for the demo per other_misc_info, but worth flagging in PRD that this is placeholder behaviour — each card prints identical content.

Hero.jsx + FinalCTA.jsx duplicate the same two CTA buttons (Analyze Property / Run Yield Audit) with identical inline styles. Minor DRY opportunity — extract a small <PrimaryCta /> component (~40 lines deduped).

Nav.jsx isInvest variable on line 29 is only used for border colours inside the mobile panel; the dark shell condition on line 31 covers nav theming. Variable can be removed once mobile borders also key off isDarkShell — cosmetic refactor.
seed_data_creation: None — all tested routes are public demo state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter43 spec was fully implemented and verified on the preview URL. Landing renders 5 sections: hero (kicker 'VELA · Asset Intelligence Engine', headline 'The Yield Brain for Hospitality Assets.', 3 proof cards buy-pass/revenue-gap/action-plan), two-paths ('What do you want to do?' with invest+operate paths and dedicated -cta testids), score-preview (animated composite 0→72, 5 readout items, 6 dimensions strong/moderate/weak tiers), OfferIntelligence (kept from earlier iter), and final CTA. Nav has 5 center links (Dashboard/Portfolio/Invest/Operate/Reports — no Pricing) and a 'Demo' button (nav-demo-btn) routing to /enter. /reports renders 4 cards (r1..r4) with Ready/Draft pills and Open buttons (window.print). /invest landing uses new microcopy and 'Analyze Property' button label. /operate landing uses 'VELA · Asset Intelligence' kicker, 'Run Yield Audit.' headline, 'Paste your listing. VELA finds what to fix.' subtitle, 'Run Audit' button. Note for future testing: this app uses CSS text-transform:uppercase on mono kicker/button labels, so when validating copy via innerText use case-insensitive comparisons or .textContent on the element directly.
rca of the issue: No app bugs found. The 6 initial substring mismatches were caused by case-sensitive .innerText comparison against CSS-uppercased rendered text; verified app-side correctness with element.textContent and visual screenshot of /operate showing the expected kicker.
